author: y4rr
content: Decision: Option B (new ferrotorch-bert crate) over Option A (extend ferrotorch-llama). Rationale: BERT is encoder-only (no causal mask, sees full sequence), uses post-norm residual (add then norm vs Llama's pre-norm norm then add), learned positional embeddings (vs RoPE), LayerNorm (vs RMSNorm), GELU (vs SwiGLU), and includes token_type embeddings. While ferrotorch-llama's Linear/LayerNorm primitives come from ferrotorch-nn (and are shared), the layer composition is structurally different enough that lumping under 'llama' would be misleading. The crate name 'ferrotorch-bert' will host other encoder-only architectures (RoBERTa, DistilBERT, DeBERTa, etc) over time.
